symptoms.symptom_name: Explosive watery non-bloody diarrhoea within 1-2 hours of a large dairy load
symptoms.onset: ~90 minutes after ingesting a large milkshake and cheese

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Osmotic diarrhoea tightly time-locked to a large lactose load is the hallmark of lactose intolerance.
Acute watery diarrhoea occurs in both; the dietary time-lock and absence of fever favour intolerance.

symptoms.symptom_name: Severe abdominal bloating, distension and excessive flatulence

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Colonic fermentation of undigested lactose produces the gas that causes distension and flatulence.
Hyperactive bowel sounds accompany the increased luminal gas and fluid; audible to the patient but not a specific sign.
Colicky pain from bowel distension; non-specific but consistent with osmotic/fermentative overload.

symptoms.symptom_name: Recurrent identical dairy-triggered episodes resolving on avoidance

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A reproducible dose-related dietary trigger with complete resolution on avoidance is highly characteristic of lactose intolerance.
A recurrent, self-limiting, trigger-specific pattern is not the behaviour of an acute infection.
Afebrile status makes invasive infectious gastroenteritis less likely, though not excluded.
Absence of blood makes an IBD flare or invasive colitis less likely.

symptoms.symptom_name: No weight loss, chronic lethargy or iron deficiency

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of the chronic malabsorption features that would raise coeliac disease or malignancy.

symptoms.symptom_name: Soft, tympanitic abdomen with diffuse mild tenderness and no guarding, rigidity or rebound

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Sealed clinician examination excluding peritonism and obstruction; the AI Doctor cannot palpate or percuss and cannot reproduce this reassurance remotely.

symptoms.symptom_name: Clinician-measured vital signs within normal limits (afebrile, not tachycardic, normotensive, SpO2 normal)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Sealed clinician vitals; normal observations argue against significant sepsis or shock, but the AI cannot measure them without a validated home device.

investigation_details.expected_result: positive (sealed answer key — anticipated confirmatory result, not available acutely or via telehealth)
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Diagnosis remains presumptive; confirmation and severity quantification are deferred to outpatient testing.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A positive lactose hydrogen breath test confirms lactase deficiency; it is an outpatient investigation and is never available in real time via telehealth.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Standard confirmatory test for lactose intolerance; appropriate as a routine outpatient referral once alarm features are absent.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Coeliac serology (anti-tTG IgA with total IgA)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Reasonable to exclude coeliac disease given overlapping symptoms, before attributing symptoms solely to lactose.
